form.formComment: Placed last time (25.63) at Warrnambool in a Grade 5, finishing second and beaten 4.5 lengths. Has two wins and three placings from seven starts from the draw. Expected to go close.

form.formComment: Won her last three in a row including a strong win last start over 400m at this track by 4.5 lengths in a Mix 6/7. In hot form and can take this out.

form.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion, recording three placings in a row, before finishing fourth (30.40) at The Meadows last start. Has a low draw but looks a each way chance only this field.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been racing in honest fashion, recording three placings in a row, before finishing fourth (30.40) at The Meadows last start. Has a low draw but looks a each way chance only this field.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at The Meadows over 525m in 30.28. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 515m at Sandown at Mix 6/7 level. Hard to recommend this time.

form.formComment: Lines up from box 5 for the first time after finishing a 5.5 lengths eighth at Bendigo (24.76) in a Restricted WIN H. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Impressive performance to score by 5 lengths in a Maiden FIN last start at Healesville, recording a dazzling 19.01 for the 350m journey. In form and must include in calculations at odds.

form.formComment: Could only manage eighth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when second (22.80) over 400m at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw and prefer each-way.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 390m at Warrnambool beaten 13 lengths (22.96) behind Paw Ortiz in a Bottom Up - Restricted Win on March 23. Comes out of a hot form race. Worth following up.
